Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current R1 Concepts brake parts catalog, promotions, and product details to inform email content.

Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces high-quality, on-brand marketing copy daily without requiring a copywriter, saving hours of creative work per email.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Creates the marketing email in HubSpot and sends it to the designated contact lists via the Marketing Email API.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes Dynamic Friction Company product catalog, current deals, and brand messaging to use as email content inputs.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes the generated email in HubSpot and triggers automated sends to DFC contact lists.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls incoming support tickets from HubSpot including ticket details, customer history, and associated contact records.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and urgency, then drafts a context-aware reply for the R1 support team to review.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket with the AI classification, tags, and attaches the drafted reply for agent review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps the entire support workflow inside HubSpot so agents can approve and send responses in one click without switching tools.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions stored as HubSpot records, including customer details and issue descriptions.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Centralizes scattered return and complaint data into a single queryable source, ensuring no customer issue is overlooked.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the extracted issue data into a structured Google Sheet for team-wide analysis, trend tracking, and reporting.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC customer activity events on the R1 website, such as page views, product browsing, and form submissions.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Serves as a customer-facing AI chat agent on the R1 Concepts website to answer questions, recommend products, and assist with orders.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Processes customer messages using AI to generate accurate, helpful responses grounded in R1 product data and support policies.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using targeted keywords to identify potential content creators, blogs, and social profiles relevant to the brand niche.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Retrieves detailed creator profiles, follower counts, engagement metrics, and content samples from YouTube, Instagram, and Google results.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Builds rich creator profiles with real performance data, enabling informed decisions instead of guesswork when selecting influencer candidates.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes collected creator data to assess relevance, content quality, and brand alignment, then compiles a ranked discovery list.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Automates hours of manual creator research into a prioritized shortlist, dramatically accelerating the influencer pipeline.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores discovered creators against customizable weighted criteria such as engagement rate, audience relevance, content quality, and reach.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Replaces subjective creator evaluation with a data-driven scoring system, ensuring the team invests outreach effort only on high-potential creators.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, email templates, and brand guidelines stored in Google Drive to inform message generation.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach email follows proven sequences and brand standards, maintaining consistency across all creator communications.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each qualified creator using learned sequences, creator profile data, and brand prompts.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, human-sounding outreach at scale, significantly increasing response rates compared to generic template blasts.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails to qualified creators and tracks delivery and open status.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates the most time-consuming part of influencer outreach, enabling the team to contact dozens of creators daily with minimal effort.

Creator Reponse.action: Monitors the inbox for creator replies and retrieves full conversation threads for context-aware response generation.
Creator Reponse.impact: Ensures no creator reply goes unnoticed, keeping negotiation momentum alive and preventing missed partnership opportunities.

Creator Reponse.action: Pulls historical influencer email conversations and negotiation playbooks from Google Drive to guide AI response strategy.

Creator Reponse.action: Drafts context-aware negotiation replies using the full conversation thread, historical deal data, and learned communication patterns.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates email copy for DFC First to Market product launch announcements and monthly recap emails using product details and launch context.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts lifecycle reporting metrics including lead generation, email performance, and contact engagement data for the reporting period.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls keyword rankings, impressions, clicks, and CTR data for all DFC blog pages to measure search visibility.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors Asana for task updates, upcoming deadlines, and project status changes across active workspaces.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Pulls the latest data from the Agent Tracker sheet containing all active agent statuses, metrics, and update notes.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status data including on-hand quantities, on-order details, and in-transit shipment information for all parts on the backorder report.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the weekly backorder report by merging live inventory data with each backordered line item, and flags dead-end parts that have no available source or expected restock.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Creates a single enriched report that gives complete visibility into every backorder's resolution path, instantly identifying which items need escalation versus which are already in the pipeline.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for each backorder status, including ETAs for sourced parts and proactive notifications for dead-end items requiring alternatives.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Runs automated customer outreach emails to gather demand data and purchase interest for two-piece rotors across identified vehicle applications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Validates market demand before committing to inventory investments, collecting real customer signals that strengthen the business case for new product additions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into one formatted output sheet for Dino to review and act on.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, comprehensive reference document that consolidates weeks of research into an actionable catalog Dino can immediately use for sourcing and sales strategy.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad campaigns across Meta and TikTok, extracting every piece of ad copy including headlines, descriptions, primary text, and call-to-action fields.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides complete visibility across all live ad copy in seconds, eliminating the need to manually click through dozens of campaigns and ad sets to audit messaging.

Meta Investigation.action: Searches all extracted ad copy for the specified target phrases and flags every exact match, recording which ad, which field, and the full copy where each match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Instantly identifies compliance risks, outdated messaging, or unauthorized claims across the entire ad portfolio — a task that would take hours of manual review per audit.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a structured flagged-list email detailing every match found, organized by platform, campaign, ad name, field, and the exact copy containing the phrase.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an actionable audit report directly to the requester's inbox, enabling immediate remediation of problematic ad copy before it triggers platform violations or brand issues.
